title: My website
subtitle: Configure and publish your agency's public site
propertiesHint: This section is fed automatically from your published properties. Colors and branding are applied from the “Brand & SEO” tab.
draftHint: Your site is a draft: only you can see it in preview. Publish it so anyone can view it.
publishedHint: Your site is live and visible to anyone with the link.
publishSuccess: Done! Your site is now published and visible to everyone.
unpublishSuccess: Your site was unpublished. It is no longer visible to the public.
unpublishConfirmMessage: Your site will no longer be visible to the public and your properties won't appear on the portal. You can publish it again anytime.
featuresHint: Up to 3 cards highlighting why to choose you. If you don't add any, the defaults are shown.
valuesHint: Value cards on the About page. If you don't add any, the defaults are shown.
ctaHint: Highlighted message at the bottom of the home page.
heroHint: It will span the full width of the cover. When editing, crop it in landscape (16:9).
